name: AdaWarp LTSF main-five priority run
notes: Current Vista priority run excludes persistence and seasonal_naive to conserve remaining SUs. The priority comparators are AdaWarp variants, DLinear, PatchTST, TimesNet, iTransformer, TimeMixer, FEDformer, VPNet, and AdaWarp-VPF. All reported values must be generated by matched TACC runs.
